subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaid of God! Until the test is brought forth and the touchstone of sincerity is applied, pure gold cannot be distinguished from brass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی تا امتحان بمیان نیاید و محک صدق بکار نرود ذهب آبریز از نحاس
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
